counters.description: heavy cc + very tanky. 2 q's plus his r will cc you forever making it impossible to heal or attack him. his team fights are significantly better than you, the only way to beat him is to cc him long enough for your team to clean him up.

extremely difficult to 1 v 1. play around his e, early it will fear you and you will not have time to recover to heal.  try to break his e or hold ur e duration to mitigate damage. hes tanky, heals a decent amount and does assassin lvl damage.

he's almost totally impossible to dual. his entire kit counters you. the only time you stand somewhat of a chance is when his r is down. his ult blocks cc so your r and e have no effect on him. dodge if he's locked in.
skill match up in his favor. he can cc you and out damage you early. he can snowball very easily. make sure to sidestep his stun.
he is just a better version of you. he is tankier and in general, has more hp. make sure to bait out his q and only fight him when his r is down.

lots of cc, healing, and shields. he will cc and kite u, the only time you can jump on him is if u dodge his root or r thought it. 1 v 1 him is easy but he can stay alive until his teammates rotate. his team fights and counter ganks beat u strictly because of his cc and enhancements.
counterstrike blocks your everything but your q. play around his e, either bait it out or kit outside his auto range. he's very hard to 1 v 1 because he blocks your autos.

blue kayn is ez. red kayn which is 99% of what's played is impossible to kill. he can buffer his w to knock you out of your r and can out sustain you. the only way to beat him is to crush him early or hard cc him and have your team burst him. dodge if he's picked.
high mobility. she can stop your active/passive w so u have 0 movement speed. get on top of her holding your q and mix your e stun and r cc.
very hard to dual. her knock-up will keep u cc long enough for her to burst you down.  she can also dodge all your abilities with her r. hold your q on her and hope to bait out her knock-up.
lots of passive armor + cc. she can stack her cc pretty often to keep you locked down. takes forever to dual her. you will out heal her in a 1 v 1.
very tanking but can output a ton of damage. make sure to not stand in her e. the only time you beat her is early. her r gives her hp and extra damage so fight her before she has a full rage stack.
only beat him pre-6 or if his r is down. almost impossible to 1 v 1 because of his attack speed + his r steal all ur resistances.

ban this champ. he can dodge you with his clone, cc you 2 times with his r, and still burst and out-sustain you. you can see him walking with ur w if hes low, the only time you can fight him is if his r is down.
lots of cc + tanky + sustain. step on his blobs when fighting him so he won't heal as much but his counter ganks are stronger than yours.

synergies.description: he is a great match because of the crowd control and mobility he offers. his tunnels help you get into better positions and his r helps catch people out.
he is great because of the cc he offers the team. his ult stops the enemy from running around and you can stack his passive really easily. he helps set up ganks really easily.
super strong adc because he can take advantage of your cc. he automatically outputs high damage so its really easy to snowball this champ.
super strong top because she can take advantage of your cc. she also adds cc to your ganks and outputs alot of damage. get her ahead and she will solo carry the game.
strong mid because she can take advantage of your cc. she also adds cc to your ganks and outputs alot of damage. get her ahead and she will solo carry the game.
she is great because of the cc she offers the team. her entire kit revolves around cc so she can lock down either one champion or a group with easy.
her entire kit compliments yours. her r is great when u jump into a group of people + the shields and attack speed she dumps on you.
great because of his knock up's and r charm. he can also heal you + and is very tanky. helps with engaging.
helps with engaging + can lock down a group of people with his taunt. his zone blocks auto attacks so you can take advantage of that with either healing or being a bit more tanky.
her entire kit compliments yours. the healing and attack speed she gives you is fantastic + her r will add to your cc.
he is a great match because of the crowd control and mobility he offers. his tunnels help you get into better positions and his r helps catch people out.
he is great because of the cc he offers the team. his ult stops the enemy from running around and you can stack his passive really easily. he helps set up ganks really easily.
super strong adc because he can take advantage of your cc. he automatically outputs high damage so its really easy to snowball this champ.
super strong top because she can take advantage of your cc. she also adds cc to your ganks and outputs alot of damage. get her ahead and she will solo carry the game.
strong mid because she can take advantage of your cc. she also adds cc to your ganks and outputs alot of damage. get her ahead and she will solo carry the game.
she is great because of the cc she offers the team. her entire kit revolves around cc so she can lock down either one champion or a group with easy.
her entire kit compliments yours. her r is great when u jump into a group of people + the shields and attack speed she dumps on you.
great because of his knock up's and r charm. he can also heal you + and is very tanky. helps with engaging.
helps with engaging + can lock down a group of people with his taunt. his zone blocks auto attacks so you can take advantage of that with either healing or being a bit more tanky.
